raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settling check","name":"What’s felt most settled for you in week four, Aisha?","description":"Lets Aisha name what is already working in the new role before moving into friction.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision boundaries","name":"Where are the decision rights still fuzzy for you?","description":"Surfaces which choices she can make directly versus where she still needs to escalate.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Partner expectations","name":"What expectations from partners are still hardest to read?","description":"Identifies which cross-functional relationships are creating uncertainty about what good looks like.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Alignment move","name":"How are you handling alignment when priorities collide?","description":"Explores the concrete approach she uses to pre-wire decisions and move conflicting stakeholders forward.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Consensus tradeoff","name":"What do you tend to give up when you try to get everyone aligned?","description":"Surfaces whether she is over-indexing on consensus and what it costs in speed or decisiveness.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Meeting signal","name":"What do you want your cross-functional updates to signal more clearly?","description":"Tests how she frames plans, tradeoffs, and ownership in meetings so partners read her intent correctly.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Norms support","name":"What would help you decode our norms faster?","description":"Opens the door for practical manager support around examples, decision paths, and feedback loops.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support style","name":"What kind of feedback loop would be most useful from me right now?","description":"Finds the cadence and format of manager support that would reduce guesswork without adding noise.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step focus","name":"Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?","description":"Closes by turning the discussion into a concrete priority for the next stretch.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
